buses.note: Bus routes serve Holland Park via Logan Road and the South-East Busway corridor.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 13 to 17 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Logan Road has the suburb's main retail and dining strip. Westfield Carindale and Mt Gravatt Garden City are within a short drive.

pockets.name: Family streets near Holland Park SS
pockets.character: Established family-home stock with school catchment access.

pockets.name: Logan Road corridor
pockets.character: Closer to the arterial. Mix of stock types.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers targeting the catchment and the family-suburb feel.
Buyers priced out of Coorparoo or Camp Hill who want similar family access at a more accessible price.
